# Security Policy

The canonical security policy for `boj-server-cartridges` lives at [../SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md). This file exists so GitHub surfaces the policy from the `.github/` directory; the single source of truth is the top-level [`SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md).
